# MTech Corp

> Jamaica-based web development, software testing, and digital services company. We build custom websites, web apps, and provide QA testing for businesses of all sizes.

MTech Corp delivers web development, software testing, hosting, and digital marketing services. Contact: info@mtechcorpja.com, 876-833-1524.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of MTech Corp services and featured work.
- [About](/about): Our story, team, and approach.
- [Services](/services): Web development, software testing, hosting, and digital marketing.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Featured client projects and case studies.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with our team.
- [Quote](/quote): Request a project quote.
